name: The Arc of Indiana
description: State chapter of The Arc promoting and protecting the rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Indiana.
address: 143 W. Market St., Suite 200, Indianapolis, IN 46204

name: Indiana First Steps Early Intervention
description: Indiana's early intervention program providing services for infants and toddlers with developmental delays from birth to age 3.

name: Special Olympics Indiana
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities across Indiana.
address: 6200 Technology Center Dr., Suite 105, Indianapolis, IN 46278

name: Riley Children's Hospital - Developmental Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental pediatric evaluations, diagnostics, and treatment at Indiana's premier children's hospital.

name: Indiana Disability Rights
description: Indiana's protection and advocacy organization providing legal services, advocacy, and information for people with disabilities.
address: 4701 N. Keystone Ave., Suite 222, Indianapolis, IN 46205

name: Indiana ATTAIN Project - Assistive Technology
description: Indiana's assistive technology act program offering device demonstrations, short-term loans, and training across the state.

name: Indiana ABLE Account (INvestABLE)
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Hoosiers with disabilities to save without impacting public benefits eligibility.

name: Indiana Bureau of Developmental Disabilities Services
description: State agency overseeing Medicaid waivers and services for individuals with developmental disabilities in Indiana.

name: Bradford Woods Adaptive Camp
description: Indiana University's outdoor education center offering adaptive camp programs and recreation for people with disabilities.

name: IN*SOURCE - Indiana Resource Center for Families with Special Needs
description: Parent training and information center providing support, resources, and advocacy training for families of children with disabilities.
address: 1703 S. Ironwood Dr., South Bend, IN 46613

name: Indiana Vocational Rehabilitation Services
description: State vocational rehabilitation services helping individuals with disabilities prepare for, find, and maintain employment.

name: IndyGo Open Door Paratransit
description: ADA complementary paratransit service providing door-to-door transportation for eligible riders with disabilities in the Indianapolis area.

name: Indiana Medicaid Home and Community-Based Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs providing home and community-based services for Hoosiers with disabilities as alternatives to institutional care.

name: Easterseals Crossroads - Therapy Services
description: Provides occupational, physical, and speech therapy services for children and adults with disabilities.

name: IEP-Hope, Inc.
description: Nonprofit offering free support, education, training, advocacy services, and resources to Indiana parents of children with IEPs and 504 plans at no cost to families.
